summary: Reviewed 4 completed tasks against acceptance criteria and product vision. TASK-129 (wireframes, 8.5/10), TASK-186 (canvas state API, 8.5/10), TASK-157 (template cards, 8.5/10) all APPROVED. TASK-172 (P0 responsive layouts, 7.5/10) INCOMPLETE — Canvas and Timeline not mobile-friendly, 3 WCAG violations. Identified 3 new scope gaps: TASK-172b (Canvas/Timeline responsive, P0), TASK-172c (a11y fixes, P1), TASK-157b (CSS naming fix, P2). Persistent issues: Epic 16 stalled 24+ cycles, Epic 15 unactivated 24+ cycles, TASK-130 Tailwind import 7th cycle unfixed.
